Video.summary: Blake gets a big surprise when he expects to learn a new sport but realizes he'll be decorating a cake.
Video.grandparentTitle: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper?
Video.title: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Cake Decorating

Image.alt: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Cake Decorating
Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Cake Decorating
Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Cake Decorating

Video.summary: Limits are made to be pushed, records are made to be broken.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Out of This World

Image.alt: Exhibition Awesome | Out of This World
Exhibition Awesome | Out of This World
Exhibition Awesome | Out of This World

Video.summary: Sitting still isn't an option for these flexible folks.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Movement Motivation, Vol. 2

Video.summary: Sometimes, we all need a little help from our friends.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | No I in Team, Vol. 1

Exhibition Awesome | No I in Team, Vol. 1
Exhibition Awesome | No I in Team, Vol. 1

Video.summary: These pros bring a smile to everything they do.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Fresh Fun

Video.summary: Maintain your balance with unwavering focus and determination.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Sense and Stability

Video.summary: No matter the arena, these practiced pros put on an unbelievable show.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Hat Tricks

Video.summary: A little hand-eye coordination is all it takes to redefine the impossible.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Big Top Talent

Video.summary: A portrait made of coffee stains, a chocolate sculpture, not your average gingerbread cookie, and more.
Video.title: Spotlight | Ep. 2.4

Video.summary: A humanoid robot transformation, a mountain of cats, a limestone leaf sculpture, and more.
Video.title: Spotlight | Ep. 2.5

Video.summary: A portrait made of coffee stains, a chocolate sculpture, not your average gingerbread cookie, and more.
Video.title: Spotlight | Ep. 2.4

Video.summary: A humanoid robot transformation, a mountain of cats, a limestone leaf sculpture, and more.
Video.title: Spotlight | Ep. 2.5

Video.summary: Handcrafted earrings, a sculpture made of scrap metal, sunglasses made of skateboards, and more.
Video.title: Spotlight | Ep. 2.6

Video.summary: A sourdough reindeer, miniature pottery, domino art, and more.
Video.title: Spotlight | Ep. 2.7

Video.summary: Travel across the globe with athletes who are pushing boundaries.
Video.title: Showcase | Hello, World

Video.summary: They're improving the basics, elevating the norm.
Video.title: Showcase | Level 2.0

Video.title: Showcase | Hello, World

Video.title: Showcase | Level 2.0

Video.summary: If you're having fun, you'll never lose.
Video.title: Showcase | Fun and Games

Video.summary: No matter what they do, they do it at a 110%.
Video.title: Showcase | Full Out

Video.summary: Clowns, cortonists, and even a few crazy kids! Who doesn't want to train for the circus?
Video.title: Awesome Academy | Under the Big Top!

Image.alt: Awesome Academy | Under the Big Top!
Awesome Academy | Under the Big Top!
Awesome Academy | Under the Big Top!

Video.summary: When the snow comes down, these students strap on their skis to show us their stuff.
Video.title: Awesome Academy | Snow Way!

Video.summary: Hang ten as our students learn how to surf!
Video.title: Awesome Academy | Beach Day!

Video.summary: Biking, driving, and everything in between, our students excel on wheels of ALL kinds!
Video.title: Awesome Academy | On Wheels!

Video.summary: Wingsuits, jetskis, and skateboards, oh my!
Video.title: Awesome Elements | As a Matter of Fact

Image.alt: Awesome Elements | As a Matter of Fact
Awesome Elements | As a Matter of Fact
Awesome Elements | As a Matter of Fact

Video.summary: From the highest peak to the ocean floor, nothing is off limits to these skilled adventurers.
Video.title: Awesome Elements | It Doesn't Matter

Video.summary: Massive waves, crazy trick shots, and dizzying heights are all par for the course here on Awesome Elements.
Video.title: Awesome Elements | Dark Matter

Video.summary: The fiercest surfers, bravest climbers, and strongest gymnasts show off on this episode of Awesome Elements!
Video.title: Awesome Elements | No Laughing Matter
